headline: Wells Fargo Upgrades MGM Resorts International to Equal-Weight, Raises Price Target to $48.3
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Trey Bowers   upgrades MGM Resorts International (NYSE:MGM) from Underweight to Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $33 to $48.3.

headline: Palo Alto To Rally Around 19%? Here Are 10 Top Analyst Forecasts For Tuesday
summary: Top Wall Street analysts changed their outlook on top names. See analyst rating changes and targets for WULF, NTRS, MGM, CSX, PINS, PANW, CF and ENLT.

headline: Macquarie Maintains Outperform on MGM Resorts International, Raises Price Target to $52
summary: Macquarie  analyst Chad Beynon   maintains MGM Resorts International (NYSE:MGM) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $46 to $52.
